_S36_NOTE: S36 — Voltkin Multi-Frame Animation + Transformation Arc (S36+S37+S38 multi-session plan, 20 total priorities; S36 shipped 6). User confirmed Transformation Arc design: chibi-form (idle1/idle2/hurt/victory) at rest + lion-form (charge/zap) in combat, Pokemon-style. WINNER frames sourced from assets-source/godly-voltkin/notes/iterations/ (5 raw Imagen PNGs compressed via scripts/compress-voltkin-frames.py → public/godly/voltkin/sprites/; existing 379KB voltkin-zap kept as-is per PRIME-AUDIT Δ7). Pure frame selector in src/render/voltkinFrames.ts maps (state, ticksInState, killCount) → 1 of 6 frame keys. Renderer texture preload via Pixi Assets.allSettled; per-tick texture swap; 2-tick transformation flash on form-swap (lion↔chibi); sprite horizontal flip on velocity.x with debounce threshold. Bundle 468.15 → 469.66 KB (+1.51 KB; 30.34 KB headroom on 500 KB hard cap). Tests 627 → 680 (+53). PROTOCOL NOTE: S36 deliberation tier was Full (>30K, multi-session, multi-file). Council deliberation got cancelled mid-launch by parallel-tool error; proceeded with strong defaults + PRIME-AUDIT self-critique (Δ1-Δ7 documented inline) under user explicit-go + authorized rigor. Treating this as documented exception, not new norm — future Full PDRs should retry Council via separate turn if first attempt fails.
council_invoked: 2026-05-18 Council R1 (grok_chat + gemini_chat parallel, 1 round, Battle Ledger 9 decisions, no vetoes, HIGH confidence). PRIME-AUDIT delta-1..7 inline.

session_note: S37 - Path B Batch (P7 procedural charge SFX + P10 NetSnapshot frame-parity test). Sprite deploy still queue-stalled at session start; user playtests at session end + reports next session. P8/P9/P11 deferred.

priorities.label: Asset compression — Pillow Lanczos downscale to 512² + PNG zlib-9 optimize, 5 WINNER frames → public/godly/voltkin/sprites/. scripts/compress-voltkin-frames.py reproducible. Existing voltkin-zap.png kept (PRIME-AUDIT Δ7).
priorities.council_waiver_reason: Inherited from session tier (Council cancelled mid-launch).
priorities.check_method: Verified each output PNG visually via Read tool (idle-1, charge, victory) — transparency intact, crisp edges, vivid colors. Sizes: idle-1 286 KB, idle-2 200 KB, charge 308 KB, hurt 215 KB, victory 182 KB. Total 1.18 MB / 1.2 MB stated target. All within range of existing 379 KB voltkin-zap. Commit 0c8700a.

priorities.label: Pure frame selector module — src/render/voltkinFrames.ts maps (state, ticksInState, killCount) → 1 of 6 frame keys. Transformation Arc schedule (SPAWNING zap→idle1 at t=30; SEEKING idle1↔idle2 every 60t; ATTACKING idle1→charge@15→zap@30→charge→idle1@45; DESPAWNING victory if kills>0 else hurt). isLionForm classification + flashIntensity() form-swap detection.
priorities.check_method: 43/43 voltkinFrames.test.ts tests pass — full state coverage (SPAWNING, SEEKING, ATTACKING all sub-phases, DESPAWNING victory+hurt), isLionForm exhaustive 6 keys, flashIntensity at all form-swap ticks + empirical sync check walking every tick asserting flash fires iff isLionForm changes. Module is pure — no Pixi/Creature dependency. Committed alongside P1 in 0c8700a.

priorities.label: Creature.killCount field + applyCreatureAttack increment + save serializer. Drives DESPAWNING victory/hurt branch. Tick-deterministic increment (same success guard as ARC_FLASH emission). Additive-optional in SerializedCreature (>0 emits, =0 wire-omit; pre-S36 saves nullish-coalesce to 0).
priorities.check_method: Edited creature.ts (interface + factory init), creatureAttack.ts (increment), save.ts (SerializedCreature + serialize + deserialize). +4 tests (factory init, increment-on-sever, NO-increment-on-race, round-trip both >0 emit-only and =0 wire-omit). 670 → 674 total. tsc clean. Replay-determinism preserved (increment in CREATURE_ATTACK fan-out runs same tick on both worlds). NetSnapshot v2 now carries killCount host→client (≤6 B). Commit 1799863.

priorities.label: Renderer texture preload + per-tick texture swap. Replace single voltkin-zap texture with Map<VoltkinFrameKey, Texture> populated lazily via Promise.allSettled. spriteFrames map tracks current key per creature; swap only when frame changes. Sprite creation deferred until desired-frame texture loads (cinematic 4s window provides preload time).
priorities.check_method: creatureRenderer.ts rewrite: imports voltkinFrames helpers, textures+spriteFrames Maps, parallel lazy preload of all 6 frame URLs, per-tick currentFrameKey() lookup + texture swap on change. tsc clean. 49/49 existing creatureRenderer tests still green (computeSpriteDelta + pure helpers untouched). Debug overlay updated to log killCount + frameKey. clear()/destroy() drain new maps. Bundled with P5 in commit 1a08162.

priorities.label: Transformation flash effect — 2-tick scale 1.15× + cyan tint 0x66FFFF override at form-swap moments (SPAWNING t=30, ATTACKING t=15+t=45). ARC_FLASH-tick t=30 deliberately NOT flashed (lion→lion; existing shake+arc carry punch). flashIntensity pure function in voltkinFrames; renderer multiplies into scale + conditionally overrides tint.
priorities.check_method: flashIntensity covered by P2 tests including empirical sync check. Renderer integration adds flash multiplier into scale.set() and tint override during flash window. tsc clean. 674 → 674 (no test-surface regression). Visual punch verified via voltkinFrames tests + manual trace through code. Commit 1a08162.

priorities.label: Sprite horizontal flip on velocity.x (directional facing). computeFacing pure helper flips +1/-1 only when |vx| > 1.5 px/tick threshold; below holds prior facing. Applied via sprite.scale.set(facing * baseScale, baseScale) — composes with existing rotation lean (left-facing + counter-clockwise tilt reads as 'leaning into leftward motion').
priorities.check_method: +6 computeFacing tests (clear directions, threshold debounce, micro-noise immunity, sustained motion accumulation). 674 → 680. FACING_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD constant (1.5 px/tick = 90 px/s, comfortably above Verlet noise floor). Per-sprite spriteFacings Map cleared on remove/clear/destroy. Bundle 468.15 → 469.66 KB (+1.51 KB; 30.34 KB headroom). tsc clean. Production build successful. Commit af76b76 pushed to master.

priorities.label: S37 P7 - Procedural Voltkin charge SFX. CREATURE_CHARGE GameEffect emitted in applyCreatureTick at ATTACKING.ticksInState===VOLTKIN_ATTACK_CHARGE_ENGAGE_TICK (=15) - wire-mirrored via SerializedEffect for 1v1 join parity. playChargeSFX procedural synth: sawtooth + biquad lowpass cutoff sweep 600->4000Hz exp + freq sweep 150->900Hz exp + gain envelope (0->0.4 linear ramp [0,0.20s] + hold [0.20,0.245s] + 5ms exp decay tail [0.245,0.25s] for click-free baton-pass to lightning-crackle.ogg at FIRE tick). Pure helpers chargeFreq + chargeEnvelope unit-tested. Promoted attackChargeEngageTick to voltkin-config.ts (DRY w/ voltkinFrames.ATTACKING_CHARGE_ENGAGE_TICK).
priorities.check_method: tsc -b --noEmit clean. Vitest 680 -> 704 (+24 tests passed across 41 files): chargeFreq pure helper (6 tests), chargeEnvelope pure helper (7 tests), drainAudioEffects CREATURE_CHARGE dispatch + polyphony + cursor (3 tests), applyCreatureTick CHARGE emit (5 tests: positive at t=15, negative adjacent boundaries, negative other states, defensive pos copy, 2x polyphony), save.ts SerializedEffect round-trip (3 tests including defensive pos copy + mixed-emit ordering). Build clean: bundle 469.66 -> 471.11 KB (+1.45 KB; 28.89 KB headroom on 500 KB cap). Commit f7f9f7c pushed.

priorities.label: S37 P10 - NetSnapshot v2 frame-derivation parity + CREATURE_CHARGE drain-parity. Empirical guard that joiner currentFrameKey(state, ticksInState, killCount) matches host across all 4 Voltkin FSM states + form-swap boundaries. Coverage via Vitest it.each: SPAWNING t=0/29/30/59, SEEKING t=0/59/60/119/120, ATTACKING t=0/14/15/29/30/31/44/45/59, DESPAWNING killCount=0/1/5. Wire byte-faithfulness check for killCount additive-optional semantics. Council R1 D3 ADDED-Gemini drain-parity for CREATURE_CHARGE: host emits effect, snapshot wire, client.world.effects mirror, polyphony case, FIRE-tick trio coexistence.
priorities.check_method: tsc -b --noEmit clean. Vitest 704 -> 729 (+25 tests passed): frame-derivation it.each tables (18 scenarios), DESPAWNING killCount it.each (3 scenarios), killCount wire byte-faithful guard test, drain-parity for single + polyphony CHARGE + FIRE-tick trio coexistence. Bundle unchanged (test-only file). Commit fe2c0e2 pushed.

_S37_NOTE: S37 Path B - procedural Web Audio rising-tone charge SFX + NetSnapshot v2 frame-derivation parity test. User picked Path B (sprite-deploy-independent) over Path A (playtest-first) because GH Actions deploy queue is stalled. Standard-tier batch (~30K execution), full 3-way Council deliberation completed in R1 with 9-decision Battle Ledger + PRIME-AUDIT delta-1..7. Key resolutions: (a) emit CREATURE_CHARGE inside applyCreatureTick reducer at ATTACKING.ticksInState===15 (replay-safe, pattern-parallel with ARC_FLASH); (b) sawtooth osc + biquad lowpass sweep 600->4000Hz + freq sweep 150->900Hz over 250ms + gain envelope (linear ramp + hold + 5ms exp decay tail for click-free baton-pass to lightning-crackle.ogg at FIRE tick); (c) wire-mirror via SerializedEffect (additive-optional); (d) Grok-added concurrent multi-creature CHARGE polyphony test; (e) Grok-added rollback ladder (waveform swap, recorded sample, gain reduction); (f) Gemini-added drain-parity test for CREATURE_CHARGE in P10. Tests 680 -> 729 (+49). Bundle 469.66 -> 471.11 KB (+1.45 KB; 28.89 KB headroom). Real context 339K / 1M = 33.96% GREEN at close.
